name: navigate-to-wikipediaorg.spec.ts
description: Navigate to wikipedia.org, search for "Playwright automation" using the search box, click the first search result, verif

steps: Enter 'Playwright automation' in the search box
Verify the article page loads with a heading
Check the page has a visible table of contents section
selectors: First search result anchor link in the results list
risks: Search box selector may change if Wikipedia updates the search form
Results list structure may change, affecting first result selection
Table of contents section may not appear for all articles
Page load timing issues may cause flakiness when verifying heading or TOC
healingStrategies: Use role-based or label-based selectors for the search box as fallback
Select the first visible result using text or partial match if structure changes
Add conditional checks for presence of TOC, and log if missing
Use explicit waits for heading and TOC visibility before assertions
